sections.heading: Problem
sections.content: Cortex search (`cortex_search`) uses SQLite FTS5 full-text matching, which requires exact or prefix word matches. Conceptual queries fail — searching "how does staleness work" won't find nodes described as "detects content drift via hash comparison." Additionally, doc sections (~635 rows in `doc_sections`) are not searchable at all through `cortex_search`; only code nodes in `node_fts` are indexed. Users must know the exact doc ID to discover documentation.

sections.heading: User Stories
sections.content:
1. **Semantic search** — As an agent using cortex_search, I want to find relevant nodes using natural-language queries so that I can locate code and documentation without knowing exact identifier names. A query like "hash comparison for detecting changes" returns staleness-related nodes even though those exact words don't appear in node summaries.

2. **Doc section discovery** — As an agent, I want doc sections to appear in cortex_search results so that I can discover documentation without knowing doc IDs. A `scope` parameter filters results to code-only, docs-only, or both.

3. **Automatic embedding at build time** — As a developer, I want embeddings generated automatically during `cortex build` so that the semantic index stays current without manual steps. Unchanged nodes keep existing embeddings (no redundant recomputation).

4. **Fully local** — As a developer, I want the embedding model to run locally with no API keys or network access so that semantic search works offline with no per-query cost. A small local model generates embeddings, downloaded once on first use, total disk footprint under 100MB.

sections.heading: Current Capabilities
sections.content:
| Capability | Status |
|---|---|
| Local embedding model (fastembed, all-MiniLM-L6-v2, 384 dims) | Done |
| Lazy model loading on first semantic query | Done |
| Graceful backend fallback: fastembed > sentence-transformers > hash fallback | Done |
| sqlite-vec virtual table for vector storage in cortex.db | Done |
| Content-hash skip for unchanged embeddings | Done |
| Doc sections indexed in FTS5 (heading + content) | Done |
| Embedding generation during `cortex build` for code nodes | Done |
| Embedding generation during `cortex build` for doc sections | Done |
| `cortex_search` `mode` parameter (keyword|semantic) | Done |
| `cortex_search` `scope` parameter (code|docs|all) | Done |
| Semantic-to-keyword fallback when sqlite-vec unavailable | Done |
| Batch embedding in chunks for memory efficiency | Done |
| Hybrid search mode (combined FTS + vector ranking) | Not started |
| Viz dashboard semantic search | Not started |

sections.heading: Backlog
sections.content:
- Hybrid search mode combining FTS ranking with vector similarity scores
- Semantic search integration in viz dashboard
- Configurable embedding model via cortex.toml
- Incremental re-embedding triggered by file watches
- Embedding model fine-tuning for code-specific domains
